{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324111542DC677BD8B9A81E5BBC5E"}"},"total":425},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609624931459859225","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"爽啊，真的很爽。主角身份特别硬气，也没有那种白眼狼，大头娃娃。这里的话，感觉这里的女性地位，特别是公主的地位，很像是唐汉时期地位，总之就是特别的爽。","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":22,"text":"白眼狼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%99%BD%E7%9C%BC%E7%8B%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743221421E5BBC5E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227609624931459859225%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227563282810547473433%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%99%BD%E7%9C%BC%E7%8B%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771757329,"group_id":"7563282810547473433","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwJhiq9UKaVZ5iNlZJJDw7w=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/00505de90a624cc9881ff1a6e0d69e01~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880943&x-signature=991WA7YO5ZqdY6eq%2F04obOdHiRc%3D","user_id":"124717820557376","user_name":"希雯娜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"124717820557376","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":38,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7563282810547473433","book_info":{"abstract":"穿书+宫斗宅斗+重生的儿子+爽文+躺平的一生
争家产大获全胜的林嫣然，因为太高兴参加极限运动摔死了，有幸穿到了一本她看过的小说里，她成了因为小说男主养外室抑郁而死的正室女配。
书中女主当然就是成功登堂入室的那个外室。
本来林嫣然都把袖子撸起来了，准备搬空渣男的私库，把外室纳进府里来折磨。
结果林嫣然发现她这个‘大儿子’好像有点门道。
所以画风就变成了，‘轩儿，管管你弟弟。’
‘轩儿，管管你父亲。’
“轩儿······”
总的来说就是林嫣然看戏躺平的一生。
楚云轩：母亲歇着，事情全部都交给儿子。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7186e02e8dc20b6d9a78ca52c458dc74","author":"倚栏君笑","author_id":"","book_id":"7563282810547473433","book_name":"穿成侯夫人，让当外室的女主绝望","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8b8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"26.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":28,"name":"萌宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=28&name=萌宝&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7563282945570505241","read_count":"266783","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"628068"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"303","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,萌宝,穿越,穿书,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/013c9098546a5bf32ae88c5b9eb2bde4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779506142&x-signature=FZhSwmjGW0tRbvNojY0n9YfhnW0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98610213512","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324111542DC677BD8B9A81E5BBC5E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":60,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_du
